description: Engine rule-guarded transition (§51.0). A click assigns @phaseTag = PhaseTag.Loading; the <Idle rule=.Loading> contract admits the transition and the cell + interpolation update to Loading. Non-payload variants store as bare strings, so the snapshot reads "Loading" (an impl-representation note for the OQ3 contract).
rationale: §51.0 engine: auto-derived @phaseTag (§51.0.C) advances through the rule= contract on a guarded write. ${@phaseTag} interpolates the variant tag (.variant yields empty for bare-string non-payload variants — a separate existing behavior).
